scripts.build: bun run build:parser && bun run build:classes && bun run build:vue && bun run build:react
scripts.publish:classes: bun run --filter @mark-sorcery/plugin-add-classes prepublishOnly && cd packages/plugin-add-classes && bun publish
scripts.publish:parser: bun run --filter @mark-sorcery/markdown-parser prepublishOnly && cd packages/markdown-parser && bun publish
scripts.publish:react: bun run --filter @mark-sorcery/react prepublishOnly && cd packages/react && bun publish
scripts.publish:vue: bun run --filter @mark-sorcery/vue prepublishOnly && cd packages/vue && bun publish
scripts.test: bun run test:classes && bun run test:parser && bun run test:vue && bun run test:react
